input.prompt: Black and white hand-drawn pencil storyboard sheet, classic film director storyboard, rough graphite sketch on clean white paper, 6 cinematic panels in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each panel a rectangular framed shot with a small hand-drawn number badge (13,14,15,16,17,18) in the top-left corner, consistent loose sketch line style across all panels, soft hatching shading, no color, no text captions. Setting: industrial plastic parts manufacturing factory. Panel 13, medium shot: a master holding a finished molded part, turning it toward the light, confident gesture. Panel 14, wide shot: a dark laser-cutting workshop, camera move toward the cutting zone, a burst of sparks. Panel 15, macro shot: extreme close-up of sparks and the clean cut edge of a part. Panel 16, medium shot: a quality-control inspection table, a master placing a part under a caliper. Panel 17, close-up: a hand stamping a quality-control approval mark in a logbook. Panel 18, rhythm montage: one panel split into four tiny macro insets - a milling chip, a laser spark, a vacuum seal, a caliper measuring.
